title: Mr Gamer IND Milestone packs
description: A clean PvP resource pack that keeps the default Minecraft look while adding long & short swords, low fire, transparent shield, full grass, and minimal icons for better gameplay
body:
This pack is made for players who love Minecraft’s default look but want a smoother and cleaner PvP experience. It keeps the original vanilla style while improving visibility and reducing screen clutter.

### ✨ Features
- Long & short sword variations for better PvP combat
- Low fire effect so flames don’t block your screen
- Transparent low shield for clearer vision
- Clean and minimal hunger & armor icons
- Full grass blocks for a natural, smooth look
- Optimized default-like textures for good FPS

### 🎮 Why use this pack?
Unlike heavy PvP packs that change everything, this one stays close to vanilla Minecraft. It gives you a fresh yet familiar look, improves clarity in battles, and makes survival & PvP both enjoyable.

Perfect for players who want **default style + PvP advantages** without losing FPS or overloading textures
